comments.comment: The vast majority of the hydrogen sulphide produced at the Quirk Creek GasPlant is recovered as elemental sulphur.  As a final step in the process, a small amount of waste gas is destroyed in a high efficiency incinerator.
A certain amount of material containing NPRI compounds is sent to off-sitedisposal and recycling facilities, however, the amount varies from year toyear.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The average emission factor for PM10 from flaring was revised for the 2003reporting year in order to be consistent with the factors recommended by CAPP. Consequently, calculated emissions of this compound have increased.
